extracted_claim: The customer is claiming a dent on the rear bumper.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The images clearly show the rear area of the vehicle, allowing for an assessment of the claimed part.
claim_status_justification: The images do not show the rear bumper. Image 1 shows a dent on the rear passenger door, not the rear bumper. Image 2 shows the front of a different vehicle. The claimed part (rear bumper) is not visible or damaged in the provided images.
